channel.title: SigilForge Studios News
channel.description: Development logs, release notices, recovered transmissions, and changes to the Archive.

item.title: Archive Lattice Revision
item.description: Shade transmission: sealed recovery vault, VeilLink identity binding, ownership imprint, and expandable publishing lattice. STATUS: STABLE. For now.

item.title: Book One Digital Release Infrastructure Complete
item.description: First full version of SigilForge Studios digital publishing infrastructure for Book One and future Archive recoveries. One live acquisition cycle remains.

item.title: Why VeilLink Exists
item.description: VeilLink is the identity tether that lets the Archive remember ownership across books, Needlepoints, audio, and future recoveries.

item.title: From One Book to VeilBorn Publishing
item.description: How an ISBN pricing complaint escalated into private vaults, ownership imprints, and VeilBorn Publishing.

item.title: Current SigilForge Studios Roadmap
item.description: Books, TTRPG, VeilDaemon, VeilLink, print, audio, and the Archive client — one connected universe.
